Special Projects

Providing a white-glove, bespoke service

Created to service new and existing Clients with their unique property needs, Knowles Special Projects division provides an efficient white-glove, bespoke service for projects which are smaller in scale but intricate in their complexity, attention to detail or value.

 

Knowles Special Projects Division, supports Clients, professional teams and property managers with a range of works from one-off deliverables such as room refurbishments and reconfigurations to minor structural alterations and special installations. Our Aftercare offering within the special projects division continues to provide ongoing planned and preventative maintenance services and property management support to our valued Clients.

Our Special Projects division is established using lean principles and a streamlined, fast-track approach compared with traditional projects which affords our clients reduced lead-in time and commencement flexibility. The special projects team are reactive and dynamic in accommodating bespoke arrangements and individual Client needs.

Knowles Special Projects division works in close collaboration with our clients and their lead design consultants on all aspects of the special project, to ensure works can be achieved in optimum timescales with flexible unrestrictive contract terms.

With the ability to draw on the expertise from the wider Knowles group network, special projects have the ability to be combined with other division offerings at Knowles including AUTO CAVE.
